query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM student_performance; SELECT COUNT(*) as with_nota FROM student_performance WHERE media_avaliacoes_respondidas IS NOT NULL AND media_avaliacoes_respondidas != ''; SELECT aluno_id, user_name, competencia_name, progresso_total, media_avaliacoes_respondidas, media_avaliacoes_disponiveis FROM student_performance WHERE media_avaliacoes_respondidas IS NOT NULL AND media_avaliacoes_respondidas != '' AND media_avaliacoes_respondidas != 'Sem avaliações respondidas' LIMIT 10;
